2605.15026.title: SemaTune: Semantic-Aware Online OS Tuning with Large Language Models
2605.15026.paper_summary: Online OS tuning can improve long-running services, but existing controllers are poorly matched to live hosts. They treat scheduler, power, memory, and I/O controls as black-box variables and optimize a scalar reward. This view ignores cross-knob policy structure, breaks down when application metrics are unavailable, and can send a running service into degraded regions that persist after the bad setting is removed. We present SemaTune, a host-side framework for steady-state OS tuning with bounded language-model guidance. SemaTune turns knob schemas, telemetry, current configuration, recent action--response history, and retrieved prior runs into a compact decision context. A fast loop proposes low-latency updates, a slower loop periodically revises the search strategy, and every proposed change passes through typed validation before reaching kernel or sysctl interfaces. This lets the controller reason about OS-control meaning and indirect performance signals while keeping model cost, latency, and authority constrained. We evaluate SemaTune on 13 live workloads from five benchmark suites while tuning up to 41 Linux parameters. Across the suite, SemaTune improves stable-phase performance by 72.5\% over default settings and by 153.3\% relative to the strongest non-LLM baseline. A 30-window session costs about \$0.20 in model calls. With only host-level metrics, SemaTune still outperforms baselines given direct application objectives by 93.7 percentage points, while avoiding severe degraded regions reached by structure-blind exploration.
2605.15026.paper_summary_zh: 線上作業系統調整可以改善長時間運行的服務，但現有的控制器與實時主機不匹配。它們將排程器、電源、記憶體和 I/O 控制視為黑箱變數，並優化一個標量獎勵。這種觀點忽略了交叉旋鈕政策結構，在應用指標不可用時會崩潰，並且可能將運行中的服務送入在不良設置被移除後仍然持續的劣化區域。我們提出了 SemaTune，一個基於主機的穩態作業系統調整框架，並使用有界的語言模型指導。SemaTune 將旋鈕架構、遙測、當前配置、最近的行動-回應歷史和檢索的先前運行轉換為一個緊湊的決策上下文。一個快速循環提出低延遲更新，一個較慢的循環定期修訂搜索策略，並且每個提議的變更在到達內核或 sysctl 接口之前都經過類型驗證。這使得控制器能夠推理作業系統控制的意義和間接性能信號，同時保持模型成本、延遲和權限的約束。我們在來自五個基準套件的 13 個實時工作負載上評估 SemaTune，同時調整多達 41 個 Linux 參數。在整個套件中，SemaTune 在穩定階段的性能比默認設置提高了 72.5\%，相對於最強的非 LLM 基準提高了 153.3\%。一個 30 窗口的會話大約花費 \$0.20 的模型調用。僅使用主機級指標，SemaTune 仍然比給定直接應用目標的基準超出 93.7 個百分點，同時避免了結構盲探索所達到的嚴重劣化區域。
2605.15026.author: Georgios Liargkovas et.al.
2605.15026.authors: Georgios Liargkovas, Mihir Nitin Joshi, Hubertus Franke, Kostis Kaffes
